title: Lentil Bao Dumplings
description: Soft and fluffy bao filled with flavorful lentil dumplings, perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: In a large pot, combine lentils and 2 cups of water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
While the lentils are cooking, heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add grated ginger and minced garlic to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add cooked lentils, soy sauce, and sesame oil to the pan and stir to combine.
To assemble the bao, place a piece of bao dough on a flat surface and flatten it slightly.
Place a tablespoon of the lentil mixture in the center of the dough.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal.
Heat a non-stick pan or a steamer basket with 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil over medium heat.
Cook the bao dumplings for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until they are golden brown and crispy.
Serve the bao dumplings hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
